node_data.text: Calvin released his album on the 11th of September, which received positive feedback and motivated him to make even better music.

selected_nodes.reasoning: Directly states the release date of Calvin's album: 11th of September.

node_data.text: Calvin threw a small party at his Japanese house last week to celebrate his new album with love and support from family and friends.

selected_nodes.reasoning: Mentions Calvin celebrating the release of his new album, indicating it has been released.
